justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was stuck in a loop where the agent repeatedly asked the user to provide a new time after each unavailability response.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating because the agent repeatedly asked for new times without offering any suggestions, leading to a very long and unproductive conversation.

overall_notes: The agent was stuck in a loop of asking for new times without offering any suggestions, which led to a very frustrating customer experience.
